title: Ankara says NATO deploys new Patriot battery at south Turkey air base
summary_full: Last Friday, Turkey confirmed a third ballistic missile from Iran was shot down in Turkish airspace by NATO forces
summary_public: Last Friday, Turkey confirmed a third ballistic missile from Iran was shot down in Turkish airspace by NATO forces

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: ballistic missile from Iran was shot down in Turkish airspace

TR.label: positive
TR.evidence: NATO deploys new Patriot battery at south Turkey air base
